title: Cauthon Maintenance
description: A Lockdown/Maintenance Plugin For Your Server
body:
## Cauthon Maintenance
This plugin will help you keep your players out of the server (OP players still can join) when neccessary and also tell them that they cannot join.

The lockdown message can be changed from config.yml

1. /cm lockdown: Turns on/off Lockdown Mode
2. /cm whitelist [Player]: Whitelists [Player] So they can join even if its on lockdown
3. /cm unwhitelist [Player]: Removes [Player] From the whitelist.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
